phrases.intent_en: Ask where the causeway entrance is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la entrada al camino del castillo?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah en-TRAH-dah al kah-MEE-noh del kah-STEE-lyoh?

likely_response.local: Al final de La Caleta, junto al faro.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH kah-LEH-tah HOON-toh AHL FAH-roh
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of La Caleta beach.

responses.english: At the end of La Caleta beach.
responses.phonetic: AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH kah-LEH-tah HOON-toh AHL FAH-roh
responses.local: Al final de La Caleta, junto al faro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the exhibition entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada de la exposición?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DONday eh-STAH la en-TRA-da deh la eks-po-see-SYON?

likely_response.local: Junto al faro, puerta de hierro.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL FAH-roh poo-EHR-tah DEH ee-EHR-roh
likely_response.translation_en: Inside the enclosure, follow the signs.

responses.english: Inside the enclosure, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL FAH-roh poo-EHR-tah DEH ee-EHR-roh
responses.local: Junto al faro, puerta de hierro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to cross the causeway safely
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo se cruza el paso elevado con seguridad?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moh seh KROO-sah ehl PAH-soh eh-leh-VAH-doh kohn seh-goo-ree-DAHD?

likely_response.local: Siga la pasarela peatonal junto al faro, sin desviarse.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah LAH pah-sah-REH-lah peh-ah-toh-NAHL HOON-toh AHL FAH-roh SEEN deh-sbee-AHR-seh
likely_response.translation_en: Walk on the marked sidewalk and respect signs.

responses.english: Walk on the marked sidewalk and respect signs.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah LAH pah-sah-REH-lah peh-ah-toh-NAHL HOON-toh AHL FAH-roh SEEN deh-sbee-AHR-seh
responses.local: Siga la pasarela peatonal junto al faro, sin desviarse.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best viewpoint for photos is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mejor mirador para fotos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el meh-HOR mee-rah-DOR PAH-rah FOH-tohs?

likely_response.local: En la torre principal, suba al segundo nivel.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH TOHR-reh preen-thee-PAHL SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh nee-BEHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the main tower, go up to the second level.

responses.english: At the main tower, go up to the second level.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH TOHR-reh preen-thee-PAHL SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh nee-BEHL
responses.local: En la torre principal, suba al segundo nivel.
